creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
scheidell    2011-11-29 12:59:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/fprint_demo Makefile distinfo pkg-message 
  Added files:
    security/fprint_demo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Submitter is now Maintainer
  - There's one more commit after version 0.2 on github. After that, the software discontinued. This version is adopted
  by Debian
  - added alocal/automake
  - Committed with changed (added IGNORE for FreeBSD < 8.x since libusb 1.0 is needed, see libfprint)
  
  PR:             161225
  Submitted by:   Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    ports (maintainer timeout) gabor (mentor)
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.9       +17 -6     ports/security/fprint_demo/Makefile
  1.3       +2 -2      ports/security/fprint_demo/distinfo
  1.3       +4 -5      ports/security/fprint_demo/pkg-message
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/security/fprint_demo/pkg-plist (new)
